data.content: Correction to the planning record: I briefly created child knots `knots-37d9` and `knots-4e88` while decomposing the work, but direct `parent_of` edges block moving the parent knot to `plan_review` until those children are advanced separately. Because this session is authorized only for the parent planning step, I removed those edges and kept the implementation plan flat on `knots-03c9`.
